query: SELECT id, writeType, LEFT(payload, 200) as payload_preview, retryCount, LEFT(lastError, 200) as error_preview, status, createdAt FROM notionRetryQueue WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
